Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 6 

CMS_RGN 

LABEL: CMS Region for Submitting State 

DESCRIPTION: Submitting State FIPS Code grouped into the 10 CMS Regions. 

SHORT NAME: CMS_RGN 

LONG NAME: CMS_RGN 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 1 = Region 1: CT, MA, ME, NH, RI, VT 
2 = Region 2: NJ, NY, PR, VI 
3 = Region 3: DE, DC, MD, PA, VA, WV 
4 = Region 4: AL,
